payload.label: couch
payload.long_description: Frontal view of a dark brown leather three-seat couch with vertically segmented padded backrests, tufted/quilted seat panels and visible stitched seams and surface creases; padded armrests with a built-in console on the right are visible and the couch fills most of the crop, appearing approximately 1.2 meters from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"couch","short_description":"dark brown leather three-seat couch","long_description":"Frontal view of a dark brown leather three-seat couch with vertically segmented padded backrests, tufted/quilted seat panels and visible stitched seams and surface creases; padded armrests with a built-in console on the right are visible and the couch fills most of the crop, appearing approximately 1.2 meters from the camera.","attributes":["dark brown leather","three-seat","vertical segmented backrests","tufted/quilted seat panels","visible stitched seams","padded armrests with console","surface creases/wear","slight leather sheen"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.2}
